hero.badge: For cities, counties, municipalities and private companies
hero.subtitle: Tourism App
hero.title: Explore
hero.description: A modern tourism promotion tool for cities, counties, municipalities and private companies.
hero.descriptionLong: Using 3D reconstruction technology, 360° panoramas and intelligent GPS navigation, users discover the history of places directly in the city space — viewing it through their smartphone screen.

services.title: Benefits for local government and partners
services.description: Lower Silesia is one of the richest regions in Europe in terms of history and tourism. Hundreds of cities and towns hold extraordinary stories — from industrial fortunes, through residential architecture, to cultural and landscape heritage.

items.title: Modern city promotion
items.description: The city presents its history and attractions in an engaging multimedia format.

items.title: Increased tourist traffic
items.description: Interactive routes and visualizations encourage tourists to extend their stay.

items.title: Historical education
items.description: The app popularizes local history among residents and tourists.

items.title: Event promotion tool
items.description: Integrated event calendar and tourist information guide.

items.title: Available year-round
items.description: The app works regardless of the tourist season.

items.title: Digital guide
items.description: The modern tourist travels with a phone in hand. The app becomes a guide that leads them through the city's history.

howItWorks.title: User experience
howItWorks.description: The user launches the app on their smartphone and starts walking through the city.

steps.title: Launch the app and go for a walk
steps.description: Using GPS technology, the app guides the user along a prepared tourist route through the city.

steps.title: Discover at selected points
steps.description: At each point on the route, historical reconstructions, 360° panoramas, archival materials and historical descriptions appear.

steps.title: Listen to narration
steps.description: Professional voice-over narration in Polish, English and German — available for international tourists.

steps.title: Travel through time
steps.description: See what a place looked like 100 or 200 years ago. The experience feels like time travel through the city.

features.title: Main app features
features.description: A modern digital platform that allows you to present history, culture and tourist attractions in an immersive and engaging way.

items.title: 3D historical reconstructions
items.description: Digital recreation of buildings, factories, palaces and urban layouts that no longer exist.

items.title: 360° spherical panoramas
items.description: High-quality panoramas allow you to see historical places from every angle.
details: Historical elements on the modern landscape

items.title: Intelligent GPS guide
items.description: The app guides the user along a tourist route through the city.

items.title: Multi-language narration
items.description: Professional voice-over dubbing available for international tourists.

items.title: Partner Dashboard
items.description: A special module for the city — a digital information board within the app.

videos.title: App and 360° panoramas
videos.description: Our app enables viewing interactive 360° spherical panoramas and historical reconstructions directly in the field.
videos.cityVideosDescription: Examples of materials we create for cities of Lower Silesia.

appVideos.title: Explore Lower Silesia — App
appVideos.description: Discover our tourism app promoting the Lower Silesia region.

appVideos.title: App in action — 360° Panoramas
appVideos.description: See how interactive panoramas and historical reconstructions work in the app.

cityVideos.title: Legnica
cityVideos.description: Discover the history and monuments of Legnica.

cityVideos.title: Świdnica
cityVideos.description: A gem of Lower Silesia with the UNESCO Church of Peace.

cityVideos.title: Wałbrzych
cityVideos.description: Książ Castle and the city's mining heritage.

cityVideos.title: Trzebnica
cityVideos.description: The city of St. Hedwig of Silesia.

cities.title: Lower Silesia full of possibilities
cities.description: Every city in Lower Silesia has a unique heritage that deserves modern promotion. Here are examples of cities for which we can prepare dedicated routes and materials.
cities.cta: And many other cities and towns in Lower Silesia.

items.name: Wrocław
items.description: Capital of Lower Silesia — Market Square, Cathedral Island, Centennial Hall and the Oder River boulevards.

items.name: Legnica
items.description: A city with a rich Piast dynasty history — Piast Castle, Cathedral, medieval centre.

items.name: Świdnica
items.description: UNESCO Church of Peace, historic market square and brewing tradition.

items.name: Trzebnica
items.description: City of St. Hedwig of Silesia — Basilica, Cistercian Monastery, Trzebnica Hills.

items.name: Wałbrzych
items.description: Książ Castle, Old Mine and rich mining heritage of the region.

items.name: Jelenia Góra
items.description: Gateway to the Karkonosze Mountains — Cieplice, Schaffgotsch Palace, Norwegian Park.

items.name: Kłodzko
items.description: Kłodzko Fortress, Gothic bridge and the charming Kłodzko Valley.

items.name: Bolków
items.description: Bolków Castle and the picturesque landscapes of the Kaczawa Foothills.

contact.title: Become a partner
contact.description: We work with local governments and private companies. Want to promote your city or business in the Explore Lower Silesia app? Let's talk about the possibilities.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your city and expectations...
contact.successDescription: Thank you for your interest. We'll get back to you soon!

footer.brandDescription: A tourism app supporting local governments and companies in promoting cities and the Lower Silesia region.
